parsed_output.justification: Caitlynn (Seer) stated she saw a specific card in the center, and later accused Mitchell of being the werewolf. Mitchell claimed to be the Drunk, who swaps their card with one from the center at the end of the night. If a werewolf card was in the center, Mitchell would have swapped into it, making him the werewolf. Mitchell eventually admitted, 'I was the werewolf,' confirming the suspicion.
